title: Song Tian
content:
Song Tian is the 
Grand Empyrean
 of the Shi Country and a member of the 
Nine Suns
 on the 
Ancient Clan
's side.

He claims to have become a 
Grand Empyrean
 and completed his dao at the first mountain born in the Ancient Shi, known as 
Origin Mountain
 and had refined its power, which possessed strength equivalent to the Ancient Ancestor's finger.

Novel
[
]

Book Thirteen
[
]

Ji Du
 mentions that he and the other 
Ancient Clan

Grand Empyrean
's were keeping tabs on the 
Celestial Clan
 and had been researching all of their notable powerhouses, especially the rising '
White Haired Ascendant Empyrean
'. 

Using a unique Devil Divine Sense, he witnessed Wang Lin's breakthrough into 
Half Heaven Trampling
 and the condensing of his 
Grand Empyrean
 Sun. However, his divine sense could not escape 
Wang Lin
's notice and was paralyzed by a mere glance by him. Panicking, he told Chi Man to open up the Origin Array and went to retrieve the special war axe that was bestowed upon him by 
Gu Dao
, which when combined together, could manipulate law (Possibly to the degree of those who have crossed the First Heaven Trampling Bridge).

Even though he knew that Wang Lin's power completely surpassed him, he challenged 
Wang Lin
 to a duel stating if Wang Lin could beat him, Ji Du would be appointed as the next emperor of the Ancient Shi. Before this, he  intended to appoint his disciple Chi Man as the next emperor of the Ancient Shi. 

After Wang Lin completely suppresses his trump card, the entire Origin Mountain and takes it for himself, he admits defeat. He appoints Ji Du as the next emperor of the Ancient Shi and allows his descendant Song Yu to marry him. He then escorts Wang Lin to the Ancient Shi Temple so he could overcome the final trials of the Ancient Clan and awaken his full Ancient power.

When the Immemorial God Realm began to open, he was present along with the rest of the chosen members of the 
Ancient Clan
. Like the rest, he returned to the 
Ancient Clan
 when 
Gu Dao
 recalled them due to the unnaturally strong rejection force that even the 
Grand Empyrean
's could not handle.
